items.title: Slam dunk with up to $720 Lectric e-bike savings (including price cuts) during its Nothin’ But Net Sale – deals start from $799
items.summary:
As we see every year after St. Patrick’s Day passes, Lectric shifts lanes to celebrate March Madness with its Nothin’ But Net Sale that is offering up to $720 e-bike savings this year – plus, two different models are getting major price cuts alongside the bundled gear savings. The biggest of these is one we’ve seen quite often, as Lectric’s premium ONE Belt Drive Long-Range e-bike with $220 in FREE gear is back down at $1,899 shipped, from the full $2,619 it would cost for this package without any discounts. This is a return of the lowest price and usual bundle for a total $720 savings. Likewise, you can find Lectric’s XPeak2 Long-Range Off-Road e-bikes with a FREE $336 bundle cut down to $1,499 shipped, which is carries a $2,035 total value, while Lectric’s standard XPeak2 Off-Road e-bikes get the same bundle at $1,299 shipped, which has an $1,835 value. Head below to learn more about the full lineup of deals so you can score a slam dunk on your commuting needs for the rest of the year and beyond.

more…

items.title: Google Search is now using AI to replace headlines
items.summary: Since roughly the turn of the millennium, Google Search has been the bedrock of the web. People loved Google's trustworthy "10 blue links" search experience and its unspoken promise: The website you click is the website you get. Now, Google is beginning to replace news headlines in its search results with ones that are AI-generated. […]

Baseus 67W Picogo 3-port GaN charger

Buy for $17 (Reg. $35)

Enter promo code FSF966DY for $9 off.

What we love

If you’re after a budget-friendly charger that can quickly power up your iPhone, this Baseus Picogo 67W is a solid pick. It features two USB-C ports and a USB-A port in a compact design, along with foldable prongs that make it easy to carry around. It’s a simple, portable, and affordable unit, that’s great for fast charging at home or on the go.

We’re now tracking a deal at Amazon that drops Logitech’s MX Master 2S ergonomic Bluetooth wireless mouse down to $52.49 shipped. While it’s not the newest model in the MX Master lineup, it remains one of the most popular ergonomic mice out there, and today’s price makes it an easy recommendation. It has been hovering closer to $70 recently, so you’re looking at roughly a 25% discount and one of the lowest prices we’ve seen in a while. Deals on this model haven’t been as frequent lately, and it’s now sitting within about $2 of its best price from last year. It’s a solid pick if you want to try an MX Master mouse without spending big, so be sure to snag one after getting more details below.
